creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Thank you for release engineering of FreeBSD 10.

I hope libiconv issue is written in FreeBSD 10 release note.
It is important for various kinds of ports applications.
Users who plan to upgrade older release of FreeBSD must think about ports upgrade plan. libiconv issue is necessary information of this case.

Fix: 

mentions like ports/UPDATING of "20130904:" tag.
How-To-Repeat: refers to following path in svn repository.

/base/releng/10.0/release/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1
